gist.headline: Chatting with the whole hive
gist.blurb: A brand new unified chat interface just dropped in the ecosystem! Now you can generate text, images, video, and audio all from one cozy spot.
gist.summary: Added pollinations-ui to the app showcase, providing a unified chat interface for generating text, images, video, and audio.
gist.impact: Users can now interact with the entire Pollinations AI ecosystem through a single, streamlined chat application.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a unified chat UI that handles text, images, video, and audio. Visuals: Polly the bee using a retro computer/terminal that is displaying a chat interface with different media types popping out (a picture, a music note, a film strip). The Monitor Robot could be sitting next to her, excited.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-head robot sitting at a retro computer terminal. The screen glows with a chat interface, and tiny pixel icons of a picture, a music note, and a film strip float out of it. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
